mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the unemployment rate above 8.5% signals a weakening labor market that reduces consumer spending and corporate profitability, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with UNRATE > 8.5% are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the housing market index above 700 signals a strengthening demand for housing that boosts consumer spending and corporate profitability, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with HOUST > 700 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the industrial production index below 100 signals a weakening supply chain that reduces corporate profitability and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with INDPRO < 100 are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the federal funds rate above 4.5% signals a tightening monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with FEDFUNDS > 4.5% are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decrease in the unemployment rate below 5% signals a strengthening labor market that boosts consumer spending and corporate profitability, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with UNRATE < 5% are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the real GDP growth rate above 3% signals a strengthening demand for goods and services that boosts consumer spending and corporate profitability, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with GDPC1 > 3% are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the industrial production index above 110 signals a strengthening supply chain that boosts corporate profitability and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with INDPRO > 110 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).
